title: Forgeulously Optimized
description: Forge port of Fabulously Optimized. Your go-to performance modpack for Forge/Neoforge!
body:
This modpack was created for those who want to substitute OptiFine without moving to fabric; or for those who have mods that are not ported to other modloaders!

## Disclaimer

All credit for the mods chosen goes to respective mod creators, and to the amazing team that worked on the original [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) modpack; and as such, most disclaimers made for Fabulously Optimized also apply to Forgeulously 
Optimized.

1.0 versions are for MC 1.20.1, and 1.1 versions are for MC 1.21.1.

## Overview

### Performance
Compared to Fabulously Optimized, this modpack grants almost identical FPS, as it makes use of various amazing performance mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (Neoforge 1.21+) and [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) (Forge 1.20).

Comparison below ↓

**Forgeulously Optimized 1.0**
![Forgeulously Optimized FPS showcase. FPS is at ~1130.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bd1826bb82b4ac1236179f7ce6b19ad27e5e359_0.webp)

**Fabulously Optimized 5.4.1**
![Fabulously Optimized FPS showcase. FPS is at ~1036.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37513bccb6cce3d6066482396d275ee8eb7ac1ba.png)

results may vary across systems and modpack versions.

### Optifine Parity/Additional Features
Almost any resource pack that states it requires Optifine will run with this modpack, along with extra features like controller support!
- Shader support.
- Controller support.
- Connected textures support with [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).
- Support for Optifine GUI resource packs (like [Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui)) via [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) and [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica).
- Dynamic lights.
- Simple zoom functionality with [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom).
- Bigger and better screenshots with [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot).
- Custom item texture support.
- Various miscellaneous fixes, like [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix).

and much, much more.

### Questions? Concerns?

Bugs, suggestions, and questions can be DM'd to my Discord account, cc123_. Ports to newer versions are currently being worked on; backports can be requested to the same discord account! Eventually, I will get along to making a github and a discord server.
